query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `__drizzle_migrations__` (
  `id` SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  `hash` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint
);
INSERT INTO `__drizzle_migrations__` (hash, created_at) VALUES
